description: This file defines dependencies for FastAPI endpoints related to user authentication, particularly retrieving the current authenticated user from a JWT token.

methods.name: User get_current_user( credentials: Annotated[HTTPAuthorizationCredentials | None, Depends(_bearer)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )
methods.description: Asynchronous function that retrieves the current user based on the JWT token provided via HTTP Authorization header; performs validation and raises HTTPException if authentication fails.

ctags.name: get_current_user
ctags.signature: ( credentials: Annotated[HTTPAuthorizationCredentials | None, Depends(_bearer)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )
